---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Kavex
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Any other context, examples, or references (links, screenshots, related projects).
